name: Odoo Platform Foundation
description: Core Odoo platform knowledge including ORM, security, views, mail framework, automation, and system architecture. Required by all domain skills.

capabilities.name: Odoo ORM
capabilities.description: Model definition, fields, inheritance, computed fields, constraints, search, read, write, create, unlink

capabilities.name: Odoo Security
capabilities.description: Access control lists, record rules, security groups, implied groups, field-level security

capabilities.name: XML Views
capabilities.description: Form, tree, kanban, search, graph, pivot, calendar, gantt, activity views with inheritance and xpath

capabilities.name: Automation Framework
capabilities.description: Server actions, automated actions, cron jobs, scheduled actions

capabilities.name: Mail Framework
capabilities.description: mail.thread, mail.activity.mixin, notifications, templates, email routing, bounce handling

capabilities.name: HTTP Controllers
capabilities.description: Route definitions, authentication, request handling, response formats

capabilities.name: QWeb Reports
capabilities.description: PDF/HTML report generation, paper formats, barcodes, custom reports

capabilities.name: Internationalization
capabilities.description: Translations, translatable fields, language support, i18n tools

capabilities.name: Testing
capabilities.description: TransactionCase, HttpCase, test tags, mock patterns, performance testing

limitations: Does not cover domain-specific business logic
Generic ORM knowledge; domain-specific models require domain skills

task.description: The task or question about Odoo platform
